LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, NOV-22-2021 HEARING HELD RE: SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANT DRILLWELL, LLC'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION GRANTED. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR DETAILS.) THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ETHAN P. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2022 Off Calendar

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Nov-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DAVID E. WEEKS, Esq. of Law Offices of Kenneth J. Fried (Tel: 818-990-0888) for plaintiff;
Atty. RYAN D. SABA, Esq. of Rosen Saba, LLP (Tel: 310-285-1727) for defendant Drillwell LLC dba Drillwell Energy Services.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT DRILLWELL, LLC'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Specially Appearing Defendant Drillwell, LLC's motion to quash service of summons for lack of personal jurisdiction is granted. (See Word minutes for details.)

The prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2021 Continued To Apr-05-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
